lyrics.text: Trouble he will find you no matter where you go oh oh
lyrics.translation: 无论你走到哪儿 麻烦都会找到你 哦哦

lyrics.text: No matter if you're fast no matter if you're slow oh oh
lyrics.translation: 不管你多快 不管你多慢 噢噢

lyrics.text: The eye of the storm wanna cry in the morn oh oh
lyrics.translation: 暴风肆虐后的场景在清晨让你哭泣，噢噢

lyrics.text: You're fine for a while but you start to lose control
lyrics.translation: 你一会感觉良好但是却开始失去控制

lyrics.text: He's there in the dark he's there in my heart
lyrics.translation: 他在黑暗中 他在我心中

lyrics.text: He waits in the wings he's gotta play a part
lyrics.translation: 他张开翅膀等待，他开始发威。

lyrics.text: Trouble is a friend yeah trouble is a friend of mine
lyrics.translation: 麻烦是朋友 yeah 麻烦在跟着我。

lyrics.text: Ahh
lyrics.translation: 啊

lyrics.text: Trouble is a friend but trouble is a foe oh oh
lyrics.translation: 麻烦是朋友 可是麻烦是敌人 哦哦

lyrics.text: And no matter what I feed him he always seems to grow oh oh
lyrics.translation: 并且不管我对他怎么做他总是在长大，噢噢

lyrics.text: He sees what I see and he knows what I know oh oh
lyrics.translation: 我看到的他都看到 我知道的他都知道 噢噢

lyrics.text: So don't forget as you ease on down my road
lyrics.translation: 因此在轻松前行时也要铭记

lyrics.text: He's there in the dark he's there in my heart
lyrics.translation: 他在黑暗中 他在我心中

lyrics.text: He waits in the wings he's gotta play a part
lyrics.translation: 他张开翅膀等待，他开始发威

lyrics.text: Trouble is a friend yeah trouble is a friend of mine oh oh
lyrics.translation: 麻烦是朋友 yeah 麻烦伴随着我

lyrics.text: So don't be alarmed if he takes you by the arm
lyrics.translation: 所以当他拉住你的手臂 别惊慌

lyrics.text: I won't let him win, but I'm a sucker for his charm
lyrics.translation: 我不会让他赢的，但我很喜欢他的魅力

lyrics.text: Trouble is a friend yeah trouble is a friend of mine
lyrics.translation: 麻烦是朋友 yeah 麻烦如影随行跟着我

lyrics.text: Ahh
lyrics.translation: 阿

lyrics.text: How I hate the way he makes me feel
lyrics.translation: 我多恨他以这种方式让我有这样的感觉

lyrics.text: And how I try to make him leave
lyrics.translation: 我如何让他离开

lyrics.text: I try oh oh I try
lyrics.translation: 我尝试 哦哦 我尝试

lyrics.text: But he's there in the dark he's there in my heart
lyrics.translation: 他在黑暗中 他在我心中

lyrics.text: He waits in the wings he's gotta play a part
lyrics.translation: 他张开翅膀等待，他开始发威

lyrics.translation: 麻烦是朋友 麻烦是我的朋友

lyrics.translation: 所以 当他拉住你的手臂 别惊慌

lyrics.text: I won't let him win, but I'm a sucker for his charm
